title: BSNL 100 Junior Telecom Officer Online Form | Big Update 2026

detail.title: BSNL 100 Junior Telecom Officer Online Form | Big Update 2026

sections.title: Set as Preferred Source on Google

content.text: BSNL Junior Telecom Officer Recruitment 2026 : Get complete details about BSNL Junior Telecom Officer Recruitment 2026, including recruitment updates, total vacancies, important dates, application fees, eligibility criteria, age limit, selection process, salary, syllabus, exam pattern, admit card, answer key, result, and more.

rows.text: Bharat Sanchar Nigam Limited (BSNL) Junior Telecom Officer Recruitment 2026 Advt. No. : BSNLCO-11/12(11)/2026-RECTT-CO
Notification Out : 27/05/2026 Starting Date : 04/06/2026 Last Date : 03/07/2026 10:00 AM Correction Date : 04-11 July 2026 Exam Date : August 2026 (Tentative)
Gen / OBC / EWS : 2000/- SC / ST / PH : 1000/- Payment Mode : Online Mode
Age Limit : 20-30 Years Age Limit as on : 03/07/2026 The Age Relaxation Extra as per Rules.
Computer Based Test (CBT) Medical Examination Document Verification
Pay Scale : The Junior Telecom Officer (Telecom) shall be recruited in the IDA pay scale [E-1] of 16400– ₹ 40500/-

items: The Age Relaxation Extra as per Rules.
Pay Scale : The Junior Telecom Officer (Telecom) shall be recruited in the IDA pay scale [E-1] of 16400– ₹ 40500/-

rows.text: B.Tech in Telecom / Electronics / Radio / Computer / Electrical / IT / Instrumentation OR M.Sc. Electronics / Computer Science.
